name: Sunday Songwriter's Open Mic Every Week at Lucinda's
description: Every Sunday join us at Lucindas for our Nashville Style (which means we play in the round) Songwriters Open Mic!!! 1pm Sign up in person to get on the list! Two ORIGINAL songs per a person (1 per person if were really crowded) Please refrain from talking while artists are playing. We cant wait to see you!
